summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of 4 new features: 1) Rebranding on Diensten page, 2) BeforeAfterSlider on Rebranding page, 3) Dark Mode section on Packages page, 4) Mobile section ordering (Expertise/Hosting at bottom). All 15 core tests PASSED. Minor issue: mobile hamburger menu button missing data-testid attribute.

design_issues.issue: Mobile hamburger menu button missing data-testid attribute for automated testing

passed_tests: 1. PASS: Desktop homepage hero section visible with 'JOUW BEDRIJF ONLINE'
3. PASS: Desktop Expertise section visible (near top after Process)
4. PASS: Desktop Hosting section visible (near top after Expertise)
5. PASS: Desktop section order correct (Process -> Expertise -> Hosting near top)
7. PASS: Mobile cart icon visible and links to /calculator
8. PASS: Mobile Expertise section visible at bottom (after Testimonials)
9. PASS: Mobile Hosting section visible at bottom (after Testimonials)
10. PASS: Diensten page shows 3 services (Webdesign, Rebranding, Onderhoud)
12. PASS: Rebranding page BeforeAfterSlider section found with 'VOOR & NA' heading
13. PASS: Packages page shows 4 pricing packages (€349, €500, €900, €1400)
14. PASS: Packages page Losse Extra's section shows 6 extras
15. PASS: Packages page Dark Mode section with heading and €80 price visible
17. PASS: Dark mode toggle works - dark class applied to document
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add data-testid='mobile-menu-button' to hamburger menu button in Navigation.jsx line 131 for better test automation
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile section ordering implemented correctly using hidden/block + lg:hidden/lg:block CSS classes
LandingPage.jsx correctly duplicates Expertise/Hosting sections - one for desktop (hidden lg:block) and one for mobile (block lg:hidden)
BeforeAfterSlider component properly integrated in RebrandingPage.jsx with data-testid attributes
Dark Mode feature section added to PackagesPage.jsx with proper styling and €80 price
Diensten page now shows 3 services (webdesign, rebranding, onderhoud) from dienstenData.js
All glassmorphism styling (bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-sm) present on cards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31: Tested 4 new features added since iteration 30. All features working correctly: 1) Rebranding service added to Diensten page with link to /diensten/rebranding, 2) BeforeAfterSlider component with 'VOOR & NA' heading on Rebranding page, 3) Dark Mode section with €80 price on Packages page after Losse Extra's, 4) Mobile section ordering - Expertise/Hosting sections appear at bottom on mobile (after Testimonials) and near top on desktop (after Process). The implementation uses duplicate sections with CSS visibility classes (hidden lg:block for desktop, block lg:hidden for mobile). All 4 pricing packages visible (Rebranding €349, Basis €500, Pro €900, Premium €1400). All 6 extras visible in Losse Extra's section. Dark mode toggle functional. Mobile cart icon links to /calculator correctly.
